# Why this file exists
This pull request template demonstrates how repository management artifacts can ask contributors for the context that reviewers and agents need. In a real project, this template would also link to deployment risk, rollback, and ownership fields.

## Summary
- Describe the smallest change made.

## GH-600 concepts touched
- List the educational artifacts or exam domains affected.

## Validation
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] Documentation paths reviewed for accuracy
- [ ] No secrets or realistic credentials added

## Human review notes
- State whether any approval-required or escalation scenarios were encountered.
